ns0:entry.ns0:title: GaloisInc/elf-edit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GaloisInc/elf-edit
Language: haskell
The elf-edit library provides a datatype suitable for reading and writing Elf files.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GaloisInc/llvm-pretty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GaloisInc/llvm-pretty
Language: haskell
An llvm pretty printer inspired by the haskell llvm binding

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GaloisInc/parameterized-utils
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GaloisInc/parameterized-utils
Language: haskell
A set of utilities for using indexed types including containers, equality, and comparison.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PostgREST/postgrest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PostgREST/postgrest
Language: haskell
REST API for any Postgres database

ns0:entry.ns0:title: b3nj5m1n/xdg-ninja
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/b3nj5m1n/xdg-ninja
Language: haskell
A shell script which checks your $HOME for unwanted files and directories.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fossas/fossa-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fossas/fossa-cli
Language: haskell
Fast, portable and reliable dependency analysis for any codebase. Supports license & vulnerability scanning for large monoliths. Language-agnostic; integrates with 20+ build systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hadolint/hadolint
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hadolint/hadolint
Language: haskell
Dockerfile linter, validate inline bash, written in Haskell

ns0:entry.ns0:title: halogenandtoast/ArkhamHorror
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/halogenandtoast/ArkhamHorror
Language: haskell
An unofficial rules-compliant browser based version of Arkham Horror: The Card Game. Not produced, endorsed, or supported by, or affiliated with Fantasy Flight Games.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koalaman/shellcheck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck
Language: haskell
ShellCheck, a static analysis tool for shell scripts

ns0:entry.ns0:title: monoscope-tech/monoscope
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/monoscope-tech/monoscope
Language: haskell
Monoscope lets you ingest and explore your logs, traces and metrics. We store these in S3 compatible buckets. Query in natural language via LLMs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: simonmichael/hledger
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/simonmichael/hledger
Language: haskell
Robust, fast, intuitive plain text accounting tool with CLI, TUI and web interfaces.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/simplex-chat/simplex-chat
Language: haskell
SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!
